error_signature: JS code node just loading and timing out
title: JS code node timing out in external task runner setup
symptom: When executing a workflow with a JS code node, it keeps loading indefinitely and eventually times out.
not_this_if: No JS code node in the workflow
root_cause: The external task runner requires an additional environment variable, N8N_RUNNERS_RUNNER_TYPE, to specify the type of runner being used. Without this variable set, the JS code node cannot execute properly, leading to timeouts.
fix_steps: Open the n8n service configuration in your Docker Compose file.
Add the environment variable N8N_RUNNERS_RUNNER_TYPE with the value 'javascript'.
Restart the n8n service to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Set the N8N_RUNNERS_RUNNER_TYPE environment variable to 'javascript' in the n8n service configuration.
